title: Group Project Meeting in the Library

all.en: Four classmates gathered around a wooden table on the second floor of the school library.
all.zh: 四位同學聚集在學校圖書館二樓的一張木桌旁。

all.en: Their history teacher had assigned them a research project about ancient civilizations.
all.zh: 他們的歷史老師指派他們做一份關於古代文明的研究專案。

all.en: Daniel, the group leader, suggested they divide the topic into four equal sections.
all.zh: 小組長丹尼爾建議他們將主題分成四個相等的部分。

all.en: Sophia volunteered to write about ancient Egypt because she had visited a related exhibition.
all.zh: 蘇菲亞自願撰寫關於古埃及的部分，因為她曾參觀過相關展覽。

all.en: Kevin chose Greece, claiming he had already read several books about Greek mythology.
all.zh: 凱文選擇了希臘，他聲稱自己已經讀過好幾本關於希臘神話的書。

all.en: The librarian kindly brought them a stack of reference books on Roman and Chinese history.
all.zh: 圖書館員親切地為他們搬來一疊關於羅馬與中國歷史的參考書籍。

all.en: They agreed to share their progress through a group chat every two days.
all.zh: 他們同意每兩天透過群組聊天分享進度。

all.en: Daniel reminded everyone that the presentation slides must be ready by next Friday.
all.zh: 丹尼爾提醒大家，簡報投影片必須在下週五之前準備好。

all.en: Sophia worried that two weeks might not be enough time to finish such a long report.
all.zh: 蘇菲亞擔心兩週的時間可能不足以完成這麼長的報告。

all.en: However, Kevin reassured her that teamwork would make everything go much faster.
all.zh: 然而，凱文向她保證團隊合作會讓一切進行得更快。

all.en: Before leaving, they shook hands and promised to do their best for the final grade.
all.zh: 離開前，他們握手並承諾為最終成績全力以赴。

all.en: Two days later, the group chat was already buzzing with research findings and questions.
all.zh: 兩天後，群組聊天室裡已經充滿研究發現和問題的訊息。

all.en: Sophia shared interesting photos of pyramid construction techniques she had found online.
all.zh: 蘇菲亞分享了她在網路上找到的金字塔建造技術的有趣照片。

all.en: Kevin posted a detailed timeline of major events in ancient Greek history.
all.zh: 凱文發布了一份古希臘歷史重大事件的詳細時間軸。

all.en: Daniel reminded the group that visual elements would make the slides more engaging.
all.zh: 丹尼爾提醒大家，視覺元素會讓投影片更吸引人。

all.en: They decided to meet again on Thursday afternoon to combine all their individual sections.
all.zh: 他們決定週四下午再次見面，把各自的部分整合起來。

all.en: At the second meeting, the librarian helped them find a free presentation software online.
all.zh: 在第二次會議上，圖書館員幫他們找到一款免費的線上簡報軟體。

all.en: Sophia volunteered to design the cover slide with ancient symbols and decorative borders.
all.zh: 蘇菲亞自願設計封面投影片，搭配古代符號和裝飾性邊框。

all.en: Kevin practiced his speaking part out loud, while the others offered helpful feedback.
all.zh: 凱文大聲練習他的演講部分，其他人則提供有用的回饋。

all.en: By Friday morning, their presentation looked professional, colorful, and well organized.
all.zh: 到了週五早上，他們的簡報看起來專業、色彩豐富且井然有序。

all.en: The history teacher gave them top marks and praised their excellent teamwork in front of the class.
all.zh: 歷史老師給了他們最高分，並在全班面前稱讚他們出色的團隊合作。

all.en: After receiving their top marks, the four classmates decided to celebrate at a nearby ice cream shop.
all.zh: 在拿到最高分後，這四位同學決定去附近的冰淇淋店慶祝。

all.en: Daniel ordered a giant sundae topped with chocolate sauce, nuts, and whipped cream.
all.zh: 丹尼爾點了一份巨大的聖代，淋上巧克力醬、堅果和鮮奶油。

all.en: Sophia took a group selfie and posted it on their class social media page that evening.
all.zh: 蘇菲亞拍了一張團體自拍，當晚發布在他們班級的社群網頁上。

all.en: Their classmates left dozens of congratulatory comments and emojis under the celebration photo.
all.zh: 同學們在慶祝照片下留下了幾十則祝賀的留言和表情符號。

all.en: Inspired by their success, the team decided to enter the city-wide history research contest.
all.zh: 受到成功的鼓舞，這支團隊決定參加全市的歷史研究競賽。

all.en: Kevin proposed expanding their project to include comparisons between all four ancient civilizations.
all.zh: 凱文提議擴展他們的專題，加入四個古代文明之間的比較。

all.en: They scheduled weekly meetings at the library and created a detailed timeline for the competition.
all.zh: 他們安排每週在圖書館開會，並為比賽製作了詳細的時間表。

all.en: Their history teacher volunteered to be their official advisor and reviewed each draft carefully.
all.zh: 歷史老師自願擔任他們的正式指導老師，仔細審閱每一份草稿。

all.en: Sophia visited a local museum and took dozens of reference photos for their expanded report.
all.zh: 蘇菲亞參觀了一家當地博物館，為他們擴展的報告拍了幾十張參考照片。

all.en: When the contest results were announced, their team proudly took home the third-place trophy.
all.zh: 當比賽結果公布時，他們的團隊自豪地把第三名的獎盃帶回家。

all.en: Their third-place trophy was proudly displayed in the school's main lobby for everyone to admire.
all.zh: 他們的第三名獎盃自豪地展示在學校大廳，供大家欣賞。

all.en: The local mayor even sent them a personal letter congratulating the team on their hard work.
all.zh: 當地市長甚至寄給他們一封親筆信，恭賀團隊辛勤付出的成果。

all.en: Inspired by the experience, Daniel suggested forming an official history club at their school.
all.zh: 受到這次經驗的啟發，丹尼爾建議在學校成立一個正式的歷史社團。

all.en: They invited interested classmates to join and quickly recruited over fifteen eager new members.
all.zh: 他們邀請有興趣的同學加入，很快就招募到十五位以上熱切的新成員。

all.en: Sophia designed a beautiful logo featuring ancient pillars surrounded by colorful national flags.
all.zh: 蘇菲亞設計了一個美麗的標誌，特色是被彩色國旗環繞的古代柱子。

all.en: Their history teacher generously offered the classroom every Tuesday afternoon for club meetings.
all.zh: 歷史老師慷慨地提供教室，作為每週二下午社團聚會的場地。

all.en: They planned monthly trips to museums, historical sites, and traditional cultural performances around town.
all.zh: 他們規劃了每月一次的博物館、歷史古蹟和當地傳統文化表演之旅。

all.en: Kevin started a small magazine where members could publish their own historical research articles.
all.zh: 凱文創辦了一份小型刊物，社員可以在上面發表自己的歷史研究文章。

all.en: By the end of the year, their club had become one of the most popular on campus.
all.zh: 到了年底，他們的社團已成為校園裡最受歡迎的社團之一。

all.en: Daniel realized that one shared library project had launched something far greater than expected.
all.zh: 丹尼爾體認到，一個共同的圖書館專題啟動了遠超預期的美好事物。
